narrative:
North Canton 2-A (precinct in Stark County) has 1,307 registered voters, with 46.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
